data.title: ETHFI price hits $1.42, breaks Bollinger Bands. Bulls aim for $1.53 resistance. Momentum suggests potential breakout.

data.title: CUPE flight attendants rally at Parliament Hill on 9/16 to end unpaid work in Canada's airline industry, working average 35 hours/month for free.
data.description: Flight attendants from various Canadian airlines, under the representation of CUPE, are set to rally at Parliament Hill on September 16th, urging the government to address the prevalent issue of unpaid work in the country's airline sector. The recent conflict at Air Canada highlighted the problem of unpaid labor, sparking concerns nationwide. On average, flight attendants dedicate 35 hours monthly without compensation for crucial safety tasks, prompting calls for action against this widespread practice.

data.title: Ryan named to Crain’s Chicago Business Best Places to Work list for 7th year in a row. Ginny B. Kissling gives credit to Chicago team members.
data.description: In Chicago, Ryan, a prominent global tax services and software provider, has been honored by being included in the prestigious Crain’s Chicago Business 2025 list of Best Places to Work for the seventh consecutive year. This achievement speaks volumes about the dedication and excellence of the Chicago team members at Ryan. Ginny B. Kissling, the President Americas and Chief Operating Officer, attributed this recognition to the team's passion, collaborative approach, and unwavering dedication to clients. This recognition underscores Ryan's commitment to maintaining a positive work environment, showcasing its consistency in providing outstanding workplace experiences.

data.title: DYDX price spikes 2.55% to $0.66 post upgrade with $1M rewards program. RSI at 56.66. Resistance at $0.71. Bullish momentum.
data.description: After a successful v9.0 upgrade and the launch of a $1 million trader rewards program, the price of DYDX has climbed to $0.66. Technical analysis suggests bullish momentum, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently at 56.66. Analysts have identified strong resistance at $0.71 as the next key level to watch.

data.title: Luxury home furnishing sector facing challenges with RH stock under pressure after downbeat Q2 results. Analysts split on stock's future, with price targets ranging from $220 to $275.
data.description: Luxury home furnishings companies are facing challenges amidst economic uncertainties and changing consumer preferences. Major players in this sector are grappling with issues including fluctuating demand and global trade tensions, which are affecting their financial performance and strategic choices. The stock of RH (NYSE: RH) dropped after reporting disappointing second-quarter results. Analyst Christopher Horvers from JPMorgan maintained an Overweight rating and raised the price target to $275, while Cristina Fernández from Telsey Advisory Group downgraded the rating to Market Perform and lowered the price target to $220. Find more analyst ratings on RH. JPMorgan stated that RH reached the lower end of expectations.

data.title: LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO) surpasses $5M in Bitcoin holdings and acquires 347K shares of PodcastOne, totaling 2.1M shares.
data.description: Los Angeles, September 12, 2025 - LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), a renowned platform in music, entertainment, and technology that prioritizes creators, revealed today its augmented Bitcoin holdings exceeding $5 million. Alongside this, the company procured an extra 347,000 shares in PodcastOne, boosting their overall holding to about 2.1 million shares following PODC's transition to a public entity.
Rutte: Intentional or not, it is dangerous

data.title: ZRO price at $1.99 with 0.50% decline; RSI neutral, MACD shows early bullish signals amid weak trend.
data.description: The current price of ZRO is $1.99, reflecting a slight 0.50% decrease for the day. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates neutral territory, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) is displaying early signs of bullish divergence. These developments come amidst a generally weak trend in the market.
